_meta.notes: The Apothecary Apprentice — a young Coldspoon local in their second year of cloud-bitters training. Tonight is the first time they are watching the master furnace through a full extraction night. They will not interfere; they are watching to learn. Non-recurring; bound to the-long-fire beat-pack.

tagline: young, three-layered against the wind, watching the fire's banking with their breath held.
